'''jazofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squamosal|squamosal]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-z-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squamosal|squamosal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jazofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæzefeth|jæzefeth]] || [[word:jæzefej|jæzefej]] || [[word:jæzefesh|jæzefesh]] || [[word:jæzefe|jæzefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jazozofoth|jazozofoth]] || [[word:jazozofoj|jazozofoj]] || [[word:jazozofosh|jazozofosh]] || [[word:jazozofo|jazozofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jazofoth|jazofoth]] || [[word:jazofoj|jazofoj]] || [[word:jazofosh|jazofosh]] || [[word:jazofo|jazofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jazoffoth|jazoffoth]] || [[word:jazoffoj|jazoffoj]] || [[word:jazoffosh|jazoffosh]] || [[word:jazoffof|jazoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jazofotho|jazofotho]] || [[word:jazofojo|jazofojo]] || [[word:jazofosho|jazofosho]] || [[word:jazofoko|jazofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jazofoth|jazofoth]] || [[word:jazofoj|jazofoj]] || [[word:jazofosh|jazofosh]] || [[word:jazofo|jazofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jazofothol|jazofothol]] || [[word:jazofojol|jazofojol]] || [[word:jazofoshol|jazofoshol]] || [[word:jazofokol|jazofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jazofothotho|jazofothotho]] || [[word:jazofojojo|jazofojojo]] || [[word:jazofoshosho|jazofoshosho]] || [[word:jazofoko|jazofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jazofothon|jazofothon]] || [[word:jazofojon|jazofojon]] || [[word:jazofoshon|jazofoshon]] || [[word:jazofokon|jazofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jazofothoro|jazofothoro]] || [[word:jazofojoro|jazofojoro]] || [[word:jazofoshoro|jazofoshoro]] || [[word:jazofokoro|jazofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
